channel.title: Johnson Controls — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Johnson Controls (jci).

item.title: CVE-2026-21661 · 8.4 HIGH — AC2000 Uncontrolled Search Path Element
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in JohnsonControls AC2000 on Windows allows Leveraging/Manipulating Configuration File Search Paths. This issue affects AC2000: from 10.6 before release 10, from 11.0 before release 9, from 12 before rel…

item.title: CVE-2026-21660 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Johnson Controls-Frick Quantum HD-Hardcoded Email Credentials Saved as Plaintext in Firmware
item.description: Hardcoded Email Credentials Saved as Plaintext in Firmware (CWE-256: Plaintext Storage of a Password) vulnerability in Frick Controls Quantum HD version 10.22 and prior lead to unauthorized access, exposure of sensitive information, and potential mis…

item.title: CVE-2026-21659 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Johnson Controls -Frick Quantum HD-Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution and Information Disclosure due to Local File Inclusion
item.description: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution and Information Disclosure due to Local File Inclusion (LFI) vulnerability in Johnson Controls Frick Controls Quantum HD allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code on the affected device, leading…

item.title: CVE-2026-21658 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Johnson Controls -Frick Quantum HD- Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution i.e Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Johnson Controls Frick Controls Quantum HD allows Code Injection. Insufficient validation of input in certain parameters may permit u…

item.title: CVE-2026-21657 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Johnson Controls -Frick Quantum HD- Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Johnson Controls Frick Controls Quantum HD allows Code Injection. Insufficient validation of input in certain parameters may permit unexpected actions, which could impact the…

item.title: CVE-2026-21656 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Johnson Controls -Frick Quantum HD- Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Johnson Controls Frick Controls Quantum HD allows Code Injection. Insufficient validation of input in certain parameters may permit unexpected actions, which could impact the…

item.title: CVE-2026-21654 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Johnson Controls -Frick Quantum HD- Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability in Johnson Controls Frick Controls Quantum HD allows OS Command Injection. Insufficient validation of input in certain parameters may permit unex…

item.title: CVE-2025-26385 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Metasys product command injection vulnerability could allow remote SQL execution
item.description: Johnson Controls Metasys component listed below have Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command (Command Injection) Vulnerability . Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow remote SQL execution This issue affects *…

item.title: CVE-2025-26386 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in Johnson Controls iSTAR Configuration Utility (ICU) tool
item.description: Johnson Controls iSTAR Configuration Utility (ICU) has Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability. This issue affects iSTAR Configuration Utility (ICU) version 6.9.7 and prior. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could result in failure with…

item.title: CVE-2025-43876 · 8.7 HIGH — iSTAR Ultra, Ultra SE, Ultra G2, Ultra G2 SE, iSTAR Edge G2 - Authenticated web application command injection - get8021xSettings
item.description: Under certain circumstances a successful exploitation could result in access to the device.

item.title: CVE-2025-43875 · 8.7 HIGH — iSTAR Ultra, Ultra SE, Ultra G2, Ultra G2 SE, iSTAR Edge G2 - Authenticated web application command injection - getOptionsInfo
item.description: Under certain circumstances a successful exploitation could result in access to the device.

item.title: CVE-2025-61740 · 7.2 HIGH — Johnson Controls IQ Panels2, 2+, IQHub, IQPanel 4, PowerG Origin Validation Error
item.description: Authentication issue that does not verify the source of a packet which could allow an attacker to create a denial-of-service condition or modify the configuration of the device.

item.title: CVE-2025-26379 · 7.2 HIGH — Johnson Controls IQ Panels2, 2+, IQHub, IQPanel 4, PowerG use of Cryptographically Weak Pseudo-Random Number Generator
item.description: Use of a weak pseudo-random number generator, which may allow an attacker to read or inject encrypted PowerG packets.

item.title: CVE-2025-61739 · 7.2 HIGH — Johnson Controls IQ Panels2, 2+, IQHub, IQPanel 4, PowerG reusing a nonce, key pair in encryption
item.description: Due to Nonce reuse, attackers can perform reply attack or decrypt captured packets.

item.title: CVE-2025-61738 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Johnson Controls PowerG and IQPanel cleartext transmission of sensitive information
item.description: Under certain circumstances, attacker can capture the network key, read or write encrypted packets on the PowerG network.

item.title: CVE-2025-26381 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — OpenBlue Mobile Web Application configuration issue for optional for OpenBlue Workplace (formerly FM Systems)
item.description: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow an attacker to gain unauthorized access to sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2025-43873 · 8.7 HIGH — iSTAR Ultra, Ultra SE, Ultra G2, Ultra G2 SE, iSTAR Edge G2 - Authenticated web application command injection - setFaultDebounce
item.description: Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could allow an attacker to modify firmware and gain full access to the device.

item.title: CVE-2025-61736 · 7.1 HIGH — iSTAR- Improper Validation of Certificate Expiration
item.description: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could result in the product failing to re-establish communication once the certificate expires.

item.title: CVE-2025-26383 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: The iSTAR Configuration Utility (ICU) tool leaks memory, which could result in the unintended exposure of unauthorized data from the Windows PC that ICU is running on.

item.title: CVE-2025-26382 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Johnson Controls Software House iSTAR Configuration Utility (ICU) Tool
item.description: Under certain circumstances the iSTAR Configuration Utility (ICU) tool could have a buffer overflow issue

item.title: CVE-2024-32862 · 6.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — exacqVision CORS
item.description: Under certain circumstances the ExacqVision Web Services does not provide sufficient protection from untrusted domains.

item.title: CVE-2024-32758 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — exacqVision - Key exchanges
item.description: Under certain circumstances the communication between exacqVision Client and exacqVision Server will use insufficient key length and exchange

item.title: CVE-2024-32931 · 5.7 MEDIUM — exacqVison - Token Disclosed in URL
item.description: Under certain circumstances the exacqVision Web Service can expose authentication token details within communications.

item.title: CVE-2024-32865 · 6.4 MEDIUM — exacqVison - TLS certificate validation
item.description: Under certain circumstances the exacqVision Server will not properly validate TLS certificates provided by connected devices.

item.title: CVE-2024-32864 · 6.4 MEDIUM — exacqVison - HTTPS Session Establishment
item.description: Under certain circumstances exacqVision Web Services will not enforce secure web communications (HTTPS)

item.title: CVE-2024-32863 · 6.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — exacqVison - CSRF issues with Web Service
item.description: Under certain circumstances the exacqVision Web Services may be susceptible to Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)

item.title: CVE-2024-32861 · 7.8 HIGH — Software House C•CURE - CouchDB executable protection
item.description: Under certain circumstances the impacted Software House C•CURE 9000 installer will utilize unnecessarily wide permissions.

item.title: CVE-2024-32753 · 7 HIGH 🌩️ — TYCO Illustra Pro Gen 4 - JQuery version
item.description: Under certain circumstances the camera may be susceptible to known vulnerabilities associated with the JQuery versions prior to 3.5.0 third-party component

item.title: CVE-2024-32759 · 7.7 HIGH — Johnson Controls Software House C●CURE 9000 installer password strength
item.description: Under certain circumstances the Software House C●CURE 9000 installer will utilize weak credentials.

item.title: CVE-2024-32754 · 3.1 LOW — Johnson Controls Kantech KT1, KT2, and KT400 Door Controllers - Exposure of Sensitive Information
item.description: Under certain circumstances, when the controller is in factory reset mode waiting for initial setup, it will broadcast its MAC address, serial number, and firmware version. Once configured, the controller will no longer broadcast this information.

item.title: CVE-2024-32932 · 6.8 MEDIUM — American Dynamics Illustra Essentials Gen 4 - Reversible User Credential - stored web interface
item.description: Under certain circumstances the web interface users credentials may be recovered by an authenticated user.

item.title: CVE-2024-32757 · 6.8 MEDIUM — American Dynamics Illustra Essentials Gen 4 - Linux Credential Leak
item.description: Under certain circumstances unnecessary user details are provided within system logs

item.title: CVE-2024-32756 · 6.8 MEDIUM — American Dynamics Illustra Essentials Gen 4 - Reversible User Credential - Linux
item.description: Under certain circumstances the Linux users credentials may be recovered by an authenticated user.

item.title: CVE-2024-32755 · 9.1 CRITICAL — American Dynamics Illustra Essentials Gen 4 - Log Filter Input Validation
item.description: Under certain circumstances the web interface will accept characters unrelated to the expected input.

item.title: CVE-2024-32752 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Johnson Controls Software House iSTAR Configuration Utility (ICU) Tool
item.description: The iSTAR door controllers running firmware prior to version 6.6.B, does not support authenticated communications with ICU, which may allow an attacker to gain unauthorized access

item.title: CVE-2024-0912 · 8.5 HIGH — CCURE passwords exposed to administrators
item.description: Under certain circumstances the Microsoft® Internet Information Server (IIS) used to host the C•CURE 9000 Web Server will log Microsoft Windows credential details within logs. There is no impact to non-web service interfaces C•CURE 9000 or prior vers…

item.title: CVE-2024-0242 · 7.3 HIGH — Unauthorized access to settings in Qolsys IQ Panel 4 and IQ4 Hub
item.description: Under certain circumstances IQ Panel4 and IQ4 Hub panel software prior to version 4.4.2 could allow unauthorized access to settings.

item.title: CVE-2023-0248 · 7.5 HIGH — Kantech Gen1 ioSmart card reader
item.description: An attacker with physical access to the Kantech Gen1 ioSmart card reader with firmware version prior to 1.07.02 in certain circumstances can recover the reader's communication memory between the card and reader.

item.title: CVE-2023-4486 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Uncontrolled Resource Consumption in Metasys and Facility Explorer
item.description: Under certain circumstances, invalid authentication credentials could be sent to the login endpoint of Johnson Controls Metasys NAE55, SNE, and SNC engines prior to versions 11.0.6 and 12.0.4 and Facility Explorer F4-SNC engines prior to versions 11.…

item.title: CVE-2023-4804 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Quantum HD Unity
item.description: An unauthorized user could access debug features in Quantum HD Unity products that were accidentally exposed.

item.title: CVE-2023-3749 · 7.1 HIGH — VideoEdge config
item.description: A local user could edit the VideoEdge configuration file and interfere with VideoEdge operation.

item.title: CVE-2023-3548 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — IQ Wifi 6
item.description: An unauthorized user could gain account access to IQ Wifi 6 versions prior to 2.0.2 by conducting a brute force authentication attack.

item.title: CVE-2023-3127 · 7.5 HIGH — Improper Authentication in iSTAR
item.description: An unauthenticated user could log into iSTAR Ultra, iSTAR Ultra LT, iSTAR Ultra G2, and iSTAR Edge G2 with administrator rights.

item.title: CVE-2023-0954 · 8.3 HIGH — Debug feature in Sensormatic Electronics Illustra Dome and PTZ cameras
item.description: A debug feature in Sensormatic Electronics Illustra Pro Gen 4 Dome and PTZ cameras allows a user to compromise credentials after a long period of sustained attack.

item.title: CVE-2023-2025 · 5 MEDIUM — Exposure of Sensitive Information in OpenBlue Enterprise Manager Data Collector
item.description: OpenBlue Enterprise Manager Data Collector versions prior to 3.2.5.75 may expose sensitive information to an unauthorized user under certain circumstances.

item.title: CVE-2023-2024 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper Authentication for OpenBlue Enterprise Manager Data Collector
item.description: Improper authentication in OpenBlue Enterprise Manager Data Collector versions prior to 3.2.5.75 allow access to an unauthorized user under certain circumstances.

item.title: CVE-2022-21940 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Sensitive Cookie in HTTPS Session Without 'Secure' Attribute in System Configuration Tool (SCT)
item.description: Sensitive Cookie in HTTPS Session Without 'Secure' Attribute vulnerability in Johnson Controls System Configuration Tool (SCT) version 14 prior to 14.2.3 and version 15 prior to 15.0.3 could allow access to the cookie.

item.title: CVE-2022-21939 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Sensitive cookie without 'HttpOnly' flag in System Configuration Tool (SCT)
item.description: Sensitive Cookie Without 'HttpOnly' Flag vulnerability in Johnson Controls System Configuration Tool (SCT) version 14 prior to 14.2.3 and version 15 prior to 15.0.3 could allow access to the cookie.

item.title: CVE-2021-36204 · 7.8 HIGH — Insufficiently Protected Credentials in Metasys
item.description: Under some circumstances an Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in Johnson Controls Metasys ADS/ADX/OAS 10 versions prior to 10.1.6 and 11 versions prior to 11.0.3 allows API calls to expose credentials in plain text.

item.title: CVE-2021-36206 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — CEVAS
item.description: All versions of CEVAS prior to 1.01.46 do not sufficiently validate user-controllable input and could allow a user to bypass authentication and retrieve data with specially crafted SQL queries.
